home.customers_body: From lean startups to large enterprises — everyone grows with Vitray.
home.solutions_title: Tools Built for Every Business Need
home.solutions_body: A suite of solutions for building products, analyzing data, and distributing reports — from small teams to large organizations.
home.bi_body: Fully custom BI implementation for enterprises: data modeling, source integration, executive dashboards, and standardized reporting — built around data quality and governance.
home.plex_body: A no-code application builder for rapidly creating panels, forms, and workflows — built for teams where speed of execution is everything.
home.pulse_body: A platform for publishing and sharing BI reports and dashboards — with access management, secure share links, and a polished experience for presenting to executives and clients.
home.pixel_body: An affordable, cloud-hosted BI solution for small businesses — fast setup, low maintenance, and ready-made dashboards for daily decision-making.
home.academy_body: Specialized Power BI courses for data analysts and BI professionals — from beginner to advanced, with recognized certification and ongoing support.
home.why_business_body: Years working across diverse industries means our team understands the real challenges, needs, and opportunities that come with growth — not just the theory.
home.why_speed_body: Extensive experience across varied BI projects means you reach expected outcomes faster and more reliably than with a generalist team.
home.why_customer_body: At Vitray, our clients' success isn't just a goal — it's our core value. Your growth and achievements are directly tied to ours.
home.why_tools_body: Our independent Semantic Layer on SSAS Tabular and advanced ETL pipeline answers the needs of large organizations beyond typical constraints.
home.testimonials_body: Real experiences from businesses that have grown with our solutions.
home.why_diff_body: Four reasons organizations choose Vitray as their data partner.
home.maturity_title: With You From Awareness to Data-Driven
home.maturity_body: The journey to data-driven decision-making is gradual and purposeful. At Vitray, our approach is designed around the data maturity model — mapping the path from initial awareness to fully data-driven decision-making.
home.stage1_body: Data is collected manually from multiple sources. The focus is on building initial understanding of data's value and standardizing reports.
home.stage2_body: The organization uses a centralized platform for reporting and regularly monitors its key performance indicators.
home.stage3_body: Data becomes the primary source of key decisions, with analytics playing a decisive role in organizational direction.
home.stage4_body: Data is embedded in every process and decision across the organization — no decision is made without it.

about.hero_body: Vitray was founded in 2019 with one goal: help organizations transform raw data into actionable insight. Our team brings together technology and business specialists who deliver innovative BI solutions.
about.what_title: Business Intelligence That Works for You
about.what_body1: Using advanced tools like Microsoft Power BI and other analytics technologies, we transform your data into visual reports and dashboards — enabling faster, more accurate, data-driven decisions.
about.what_body2: We focus on empowering organizations to thrive in competitive markets, delivering tailored solutions for every industry's unique requirements.
about.what_body3: Vitray's ultimate goal is to drive digital transformation and strengthen data-driven innovation across organizations.
about.story_title: Vitray: the Art of Breathing Life into Glass
about.story_body: At Vitray, we bring that same artistic spirit to your data — transforming it into clear, meaningful visuals that make decisions easier and the future more legible.
about.maturity_title: With You from Data Awareness to Data-Driven
about.maturity_body: Becoming data-driven is a deliberate, step-by-step journey. At Vitray, our approach is built on the Data Maturity Model — a framework that maps an organization's path from first awareness all the way to fully data-driven decision-making.
about.maturity_closing: Throughout this journey, Vitray acts as your trusted advisor — from identifying your organization's current position on the maturity model, to designing the technical and analytical solutions that match your future goals.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.body: For a free consultation or any questions about Vitray products, drop us a message.
contact.address_value: Unit 5, No. 28, Negarestan 4th, Pasdaran, Tehran, Iran
contact.company_blurb: Vitray was founded to help organizations turn raw data into actionable insight. Our team of technology and business specialists delivers innovative BI solutions.
contact.success_body: We'll be in touch with you shortly.

plex_hero.body: Build enterprise applications, smart workflows, and custom solutions in record time — no development team or technical complexity required.

pixel_hero.body: A fully cloud-hosted BI service for small and mid-sized businesses — no servers, no IT team, up and running in hours.

pulse_hero.title: A New Way to Manage and Share Your Power BI Reports
pulse_hero.body: A centralized portal for publishing and sharing Power BI reports — with a fully localized interface, Jalali calendar support, and fine-grained access control.

dashboards.b2b_desc: Track sales opportunities, team performance, and enterprise client analysis at a glance.
dashboards.dist_desc: Manage distribution channels, agent performance, and regional sales analysis.
dashboards.finance_desc: Monitor cash flow, profitability, budgets, and comprehensive financial reports.
dashboards.hr_desc: Track employee performance, attendance, training, and organizational development.
dashboards.warehouse_desc: Manage inventory, reorder points, and analyze stock turnover.
dashboards.production_desc: Monitor production lines, waste rates, machine efficiency, and OEE metrics.
dashboards.maintenance_desc: Plan preventive maintenance, track breakdowns, and manage repair costs.
dashboards.related_body: Explore specialized dashboard templates for other industries.
